title: PyArcana Skeptical Functional Verification — Final Report & Handover
scope: El Arte de Python V3 (52 sections) + Next.js platform (auth, exam, progress, admin, subscription, capstones)

phase_0.preamble: Establish skeptical methodology: only real execution, HTTP, DB counts, process exits count as evidence.
pre_round_research: Google SRE production readiness — probe real SLOs
phase_0.retrospection: Playbook + severity rubric established; prior course_complete not trusted until re-proven.

phase_1.preamble: Complete inventory of claimed features and flows.

core_user_journeys: Landing → register/login → dashboard → section theory/ido/wedo/youdo → exam → progress
Admin login → students list → CSV export
Free plan gate maxSections=5 → upgrade path

phase_1.retrospection: Map complete; admin completion denominator flagged for Phase 2/3.

phase_2.preamble: Deeply mistrustful static audit for stubs, mocks, hardcodes, stale claims.
findings_real: P3: OAuth toast (honest non-config, not fake success)
phase_2.noise_discarded: Spanish 'Todo', HTML placeholder attrs, pedagogical 'placeholder' in course content
phase_2.retrospection: One real P1 + one P2 user-facing stale copy; OAuth residual P3.

phase_3.preamble: Prove behavior by live execution — no mocks.

evidence.npm_test_all_gates: PASS (v3 counts/structure/invariant + layout self-test + course_complete + 17 playwright)

phase_3.retrospection: Core course + gates real; admin hardcode still present until Phase 5.

phase_4.preamble: Root-cause and latent blast radius for open issues.

rca.impact: Admin metrics/CSV wrong; mixed 10 label with /52 pct on students route
rca.latent: Any other hardcode of section count — grepped clean after fix; PdfReport already 52

rca.why: i18n/page copy not wired to COURSE_META

phase_4.retrospection: Fixes are minimal SSOT import + copy updates.

phase_5.preamble: Apply minimal complete fixes; re-validate with live probes.
phase_5.retrospection: P1+P2 closed with live proof; no regressions in gates.

phase_6.preamble: Full inventory re-check against live behavior.
phase_6.placeholders_stubs_mocks_in_core_paths: NONE remaining that claim success without work. OAuth is honest non-config.

success_criteria.criterion: Every claimed core feature proven by real execution
Zero placeholders/stubs/mocks faking success in core paths
Critical integrations and user flows work E2E
Full evidence trail for findings and fixes

residual_risks: OAuth requires production secrets before marketing social login
Free plan maxSections=5 is intentional — do not treat as bug
Rate limits on register may block automated mass signup (by design)
.env and SQLite DB intentionally excluded from git commits
recommended_monitoring: Assert admin.students[*].totalSections === COURSE_META.totalSections in CI smoke
Synthetic exam start/submit smoke with seeded demo user
phase_7.declaration: SUCCESS — skeptical functional verification complete with evidence; zero open P0/P1.
